Blocks.Content:
A variable can be created first,
and the value can be added later.

This is called assigning a value.

First you create the variable,
then you put data into it.

In the first line the variable age is created.
It does not have a value yet.

In the second line the value 25 is assigned to it.

Now the variable stores a number.
Retype this code and check it.

Try to create a variable and assign a value to it in two steps.

Name it score.
First create the variable.
Then assign the value 50.
The symbol = means put a value into a variable, not equal like in mathematics.
